purpose: Win32 resource script. Stamps the compiled MarkdownPlusPlus.dll with a VS_VERSION_INFO block (FILEVERSION/PRODUCTVERSION 0.1.0.0, CompanyName 'Markdown++', FileDescription 'Markdown++ native Notepad++ plugin', InternalName 'MarkdownPlusPlus', OriginalFilename 'MarkdownPlusPlus.dll') used by Windows for the Properties dialog and by Notepad++'s About dialog.
invariants: FileVersion / ProductVersion strings should be kept in sync with the CMake project version and the About-dialog version string in PluginController::ShowAbout.
gotchas: Compiled by the RC compiler (enable_language(RC) in the inner CMakeLists). On non-Windows builds the CMakeLists short-circuits, so this file is never seen.
